zh.lifeSummary: 當Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn於1177年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，他的父親Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles34歲，母親Margaret Stuart of Moidart27歲。他於大約1195年與Lady Margaret MacLachlan在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1219年住在蘇格蘭阿吉爾登貝。他去世於1245年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾享年68歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾阿爾哈坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn于1177年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾时，他的父亲Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles34岁，母亲Margaret Stuart of Moidart27岁。他于大约1195年与Lady Margaret MacLachlan在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1219年住在苏格兰阿吉爾登貝。他去世于1245年在苏格兰阿吉爾享年68岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾阿爾哈坦。

nameMeanings.name: Donnchadh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

variants.name: Duncan
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

en.lifeSummary: When Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn was born in 1177, in Argyll, Scotland, his father, Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles, was 34 and his mother, Margaret Stuart of Moidart, was 27. He married Lady Margaret MacLachlan about 1195, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Dunbeg, Argyll, Scotland in 1219. He died in 1245, in Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 68, and was buried in Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland: Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn est né en 1177, à Argyll, Écosse, son père, Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stuart of Moidart, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret MacLachlan environ 1195, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Dunbeg, Argyll, Écosse en 1219. Il est décédé en 1245, à Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Ardchattan, Argyll, Écosse.

de.Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland: Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn 1177 in Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles 34 und seine Mutter Margaret Stuart of Moidart 27. Er hat um 1195 in Argyll, Scotland Lady Margaret MacLachlan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1219 hat er in Dunbeg, Argyll, Scotland gelebt. Er starb 1245 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn è nato il nel 1177 nel Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Stuart of Moidart, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret MacLachlan circa 1195, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Dunbeg, Argyll, Scotland nel 1219. Morì nel 1245, nel Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lornが1177年にスコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，父Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Islesは34歳，母Margaret Stuart of Moidartは27歳であった。約1195年にスコットランドアルグイルでLady Margaret MacLachlanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1219年にはスコットランドアルグイルダンベグに住んでいた。彼は1245年にスコットランドアルグイルで68歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルアルドチャッタンにて埋葬された。

ko.Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 로스 앤드 크로마티 크로마티
ko.lifeSummary: Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn(이)가 1177년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Stuart of Moidart(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1195년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Lady Margaret MacLachlan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1219년도에 스컷랜드 아그이 던베그에서 살았다. 그는 1245년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 아드차탠에 묻혔다.

pt.Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland: Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn nasceu em 1177, em Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Stuart of Moidart, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret MacLachlan aproximadamente 1195, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Dunbeg, Argyll, Scotland em 1219. Ele faleceu em 1245, em Argyll, Scotland, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland.

ro.Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland: Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.Cromarty, Ross and Cromarty, Scotland: кромерти, росс анд кромерти, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Donnchadh Macdubhghaill King of the Isles, Second Lord of Dunollie and of Lorn родился в 1177 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stuart of Moidart, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret MacLachlan около 1195 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности дунбег, аргилл, Шотландия в 1219 году. Он умер в 1245 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности ардчаттань, аргилл, Шотландия.

Se casó con Lady Margaret MacLachlan aproximadamente 1195, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Dunbeg, Argyll, Scotland en 1219. Murió en 1245, en Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland.
